title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how to build agentic workflows across the entire software development lifecycle to overcome the productivity plateau that most companies hit with AI coding assistants. The talk covers agent applications including bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and explores organizational changes needed for agent-driven development.
